notes: Win32 PowerPoint COM operation plan for the current WorkIQ origin deck diagrams.
Slide 1 represents the latest page-2 MCPHub architecture diagram.
Slide 2 represents page-3 left workflow: Worker connects outbound, register binding, update_tools, publish catalog.
Slide 3 represents page-3 right workflow: Agent Runtime request/result loop, Gateway cloud route/sign/audit, Worker verify/execute, result returns through Gateway.
Expected executor mapping: shapeType=cloud => msoShapeCloud; roundRect => msoShapeRoundedRectangle; addPicture => Shapes.AddPicture; addConnector supports begin/end and optional elbow points.

operations.name: footer
operations.text: Cloud agents call one governed service; user devices register capabilities and execute locally.

operations.name: slide.subtitle
operations.text: Worker-initiated outbound connection; Gateway stores binding and capability catalog.

operations.name: reg.footer
operations.text: Protect: no inbound port on personal devices. Worker registers binding, then publishes a user-scoped capability catalog.

operations.name: slide.subtitle
operations.text: Agent request and result stay inside Agent Runtime; Gateway cloud routes, signs, records Activity.

operations.name: call.footer
operations.text: Route / Execute: Gateway selects Worker by connectionId, clientName, or labels; Worker verifies and invokes toolRegistry.callTool.
